title: pilosella flagellaris subsp. besnikensis
intro: Pilosella flagellaris subsp. besnikensis is a subspecies of the Pilosella flagellaris plant, which is a type of flowering plant in the dandelion family (Asteraceae). This plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine, particularly in the Balkan region, where it has been employed to treat various health issues due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant has been reported to exhibit potential health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and treating respiratory problems. Pilosella flagellaris subsp. besnikensis is typically prepared as an infusion or decoction, often combined with other herbs, to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
